## Source: ghsa-malware (9e4aed04ed86972fc445b42c2c630aae4a04d3e1242e1a92f5bfd4583ca1e1a5)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (fdfcf3942823c14a7ceea5d23cfca1c1e841ebcea1ba353a95e16d204a90bca4)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-examples-octocat' @ 1.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
